title: Galliwig
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Galliwig |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{DarkStryder|adventure=Turazza Eggs|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galliwig's Cantina]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Looks like yer got some bad end of yer latest deal, there, Lookar.|Galliwig, to Loh'khar the Finder|}} '''Galliwig''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who owned and ran [[Galliwig's Cantina]]. Sometime prior to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Galliwig encountered the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Loh'khar]] the Finder, a [[free-trader]] who was in possession of three seemingly worthless [[Egg/Legends|eggs]]. Galliwig offered Loh'khar twenty-five [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the eggs, but the Twi'lek refused the offer. Galliwig watched as the three eggs hatched into baby [[Turazza]]s. ==Biography== {{Quote|Tell yer what. I'll trade yer those eggs for 25 credits. Take 'em off yer hands real easy like.''"
"''I'll pass, thank you.|Galliwig and Loh'khar the Finder|}} Galliwig, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], owned and managed [[Galliwig's Cantina]]. At some point prior to the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],The events of {{DarkStryder|adventure=Turazza Eggs|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}} take place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[free-trader]] [[Loh'khar]] the Finder used Galliwig's [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] to conduct business in. One day, Galliwig approached Loh'khar, who had recently acquired three fist-sized [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] in a business transaction, and commented that the Twi'lek appeared to have gotten the worse end of the deal. Loh'khar replied that, to him, there were no bad ends to any deal, since every one he engaged in was designed to bring in maximum profit for himself. Confused by the free-trader's statement, Galliwig offered Loh'khar twenty-five [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the eggs, which Loh'khar refused. While Galliwig looked on perplexed, the eggs hatched, producing three [[Turazza]] sisters. Loh'khar bonded with the infant [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]], eventually naming them [[Nizzal]], [[Vizzal]], and [[Rizzal]].''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' ==Personality and traits== Galliwig had a swarthy look to him and spoke with a drawl. He wore an apron while working in his cantina. Galliwig was confused at Loh'khar's views that obtaining three seemingly worthless eggs did not constitute a bad deal. ==Behind the scenes== Galliwig appeared in the short text story ''[[Turazza Eggs]]'' by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], which appeared in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]]. The story served as a backstory showing how Loh'khar had acquired the three Turazza sisters who served him. ==Appearances== *{{DarkStryder|adventure=Turazza Eggs|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The DarkStryder Campaign, Deluxe]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Business owners and executives]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
